title: IIT JEE Advanced Entrance Exam Result 2026
short_info: IIT Roorkee has released the Information Brochure for Joint Entrance Examination (Advanced) 2026 Those Candidates are Enrolled to the Admissions in IIT JEE Advanced 2026 Exam Can Download Admit Card. candidates should read the JEE Advanced 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and University List, information and other types of information and then apply WhatsApp Join Now Telegram Join Now Joint Entrance Examination (Advanced) Conducted By: IIT Roorkee IIT JEE Advanced Admission Online Form 2026 JEE Advanced Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC : 3200 /- SC / ST / PH : 1600 /- All Category Female : 1600 /- Pay the Examination Fee Through Online or Offline Fee Mode. JEE Advanced Eligibility Passed JEE MAIN 2026 Entrance Test with Secured Qualified Marks. JEE Advanced

rows: IIT JEE Advanced Admissions 2026 Download Result

tables.table_name: Interested Candidates Can Read the Full JEE Advanced 2026 Notification Before Apply Online
rows: Important Dates Application Begin : 23/04/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 05/05/2026 Last Date Fee Payment : 05/05/2026 JEE Advanced Exam Held Date : 17/05/2026 Admit Card Available : 11/05/2026 Question Paper Available : 21/05/2026 Answer Key Available : 25/05/2026 Result Declared : 01/06/2026

JEE Advanced Eligibility Passed JEE MAIN 2026 Entrance Test with Secured Qualified Marks.

JEE Advanced Age Limit Eligible Candidates Must be Born After : 01/10/2001 for General / OBC / EWS. Candidate Must be Born After : 01/10/1996 for SC / ST / PH Candidates Age Relaxation As per JEE Advance Rules
